title: Tabs on the desktop app
excerpt: Hello, I would like to submit the idea of tab implementation in the Monday desktop app.

posts.author: jos (joshua kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I would like to submit the idea of tab implementation in the Monday desktop app.

posts.author: pjimenez (Pedro Jimenez)
posts.cookedHtml: I miss this feature from Wrike. Or another idea is to have a split view of two boards. A work around is opening the desktop app in another window. You can have two windows of Monday.com up and running with the desktop app.

posts.author: Daniel_Ellis (Daniel Ellis)
posts.cookedHtml: @pjimenez @jos By chance do you know this is being considered?

posts.author: simone.steffen (Simone Steffen)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be so helpful to work on multiple boards at once on the desktop app.

posts.author: jramieri (Jackie Ramieri )
posts.cookedHtml: That would be REALLY helpful. Using the platform in the browser normally (not incognito) is impossible because it eats all of the memory. Being able to work in the desktop app in multiple tabs to have multiple boards up at the same time is essential. Just switched from Asana and Asana had that capability. Also - having the ability to quick ALT/TAB toggle between tabs in the app would be fantastic.

posts.author: tpollet (Thomas POLLET)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes we need it! Working with app instead of browser has multiple pros but not having multi-tabs is a huge con.
